title: JV-05 - OPUS-MT ja-vi CTranslate2 or ORT candidate smoke and benchmark

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Implement and benchmark the primary OPUS-MT ja->vi candidate in the local MT benchmark path.

## Why is this needed?

OPUS-MT ja-vi is Apache-2.0, direct, small, and the best default candidate if quality is sufficient.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-ja-vi model card and license.
- Runtime spike decision from JV-10 if available.
- Benchmark harness from JV-03 and corpus from JV-02.

## Outputs

- Converted int8 model bundle candidate with pinned model hash.
- Smoke test proving Rust runtime can load and translate one ja->vi sentence on Windows.
- 10-round benchmark artifact for OPUS-MT candidate.

## Implementation approach

- Start with CTranslate2 int8 via ct2rs if spike confirms viability; otherwise use ORT KV-cache export.
- Pin source model revision and conversion command.
- Record model size, SHA-256, quantization, beam/greedy settings, CPU/RAM, and latency.
- Do not wire as default in this issue.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Windows smoke translates a deterministic ja sentence to non-empty vi output.
- [ ] Benchmark artifact has 10 valid rounds or documented failure reason.
- [ ] p95, RTF, RSS, CPU, chrF++, BLEU, and error rate are recorded.
- [ ] License attribution requirements are documented.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Model load smoke test.
- [ ] Missing model returns actionable ModelNotFound.
- [ ] Benchmark validator passes.
- [ ] No network calls after model is installed.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-02 and JV-03.
- Should use JV-10 runtime decision when ready.
- Blocks JV-08.

## Agent routing

Build: provider/performance specialist. Review: tui-rust-code-reviewer and nfr-verification-gate.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-05
- Wave: M1 candidate
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: feature, area: providers, provider: local, area: performance, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

Extends #372 by executing the real candidate benchmark.
